description: Analyze Douyin (TikTok China) workflows with JustOneAPI, including user Profile, user Published Videos, and video Details across 9 operations.

operations.description: Get Douyin (TikTok China) user Profile data, including follower counts, verification status, and bio details, for creator research and account analysis.

parameters.description: Access token for this API service.
parameters.name: token

parameters.description: The unique user ID (sec_uid) on Douyin.
parameters.name: secUid

operations.description: Get Douyin (TikTok China) user Published Videos data, including captions, covers, and publish times, for account monitoring.

parameters.description: Access token for this API service.
parameters.name: token

parameters.description: The unique user ID (sec_uid) on Douyin.
parameters.name: secUid

parameters.description: Pagination cursor; use 0 for the first page, and the `max_cursor` from the previous response for subsequent pages.
parameters.name: maxCursor

operations.description: Get Douyin (TikTok China) user Published Videos data, including captions, covers, and publish times, for account monitoring.

parameters.description: Access token for this API service.
parameters.name: token

parameters.description: The unique user ID (sec_uid) on Douyin.
parameters.name: secUid

parameters.description: Pagination cursor; use 0 for the first page, and the `max_cursor` from the previous response for subsequent pages.
parameters.name: maxCursor

operations.description: Get Douyin (TikTok China) video Comments data, including authors, text, and likes, for sentiment analysis and engagement review.

parameters.description: Access token for this API service.
parameters.name: token

parameters.description: The unique video identifier (aweme_id).
parameters.name: awemeId

parameters.description: Page number (starting from 1).
parameters.name: page

operations.description: Get Douyin (TikTok China) video Details data, including author details, publish time, and engagement counts, for video research, archiving, and performance analysis.

parameters.description: Access token for this API service.
parameters.name: token

parameters.description: The unique video identifier (aweme_id or model_id).
parameters.name: videoId

operations.description: Get Douyin (TikTok China) comment Replies data, including text, authors, and timestamps, for thread analysis and feedback research.

parameters.description: Access token for this API service.
parameters.name: token

parameters.description: The unique identifier of the top-level comment.
parameters.name: commentId

parameters.description: Page number (starting from 1).
parameters.name: page

operations.description: Get Douyin (TikTok China) user Search data, including profile metadata and follower signals, for creator discovery and account research.

parameters.description: Access token for this API service.
parameters.name: token

parameters.description: The search keyword.
parameters.name: keyword

parameters.description: Page number (starting from 1).
parameters.name: page

parameters.description:
Filter by user type.

Available Values:
- `common_user`: Common User
- `enterprise_user`: Enterprise User
- `personal_user`: Verified Individual User
parameters.name: userType

operations.description: Get Douyin (TikTok China) video Search data, including metadata and engagement signals, for content discovery, trend research, and competitive monitoring.

parameters.description: Access token for this API service.
parameters.name: token

parameters.description: The search keyword.
parameters.name: keyword

parameters.description:
Sorting criteria for search results.

Available Values:
- `_0`: General
- `_1`: More likes
- `_2`: Newest
parameters.name: sortType

parameters.description:
Filter by video publish time range.

Available Values:
- `_0`: No Limit
- `_1`: Last 24 Hours
- `_7`: Last 7 Days
- `_180`: Last 6 Months
parameters.name: publishTime

parameters.description:
Filter by video duration.

Available Values:
- `_0`: No Limit
- `_1`: Under 1 Minute
- `_2`: 1-5 Minutes
- `_3`: Over 5 Minutes
parameters.name: duration

parameters.description: Page number (starting from 1).
parameters.name: page

parameters.description: Search ID; required for pages > 1 (use the search_id value returned by the last response).
parameters.name: searchId

operations.description: Get Douyin (TikTok China) share Link Resolution data, including helping extract canonical IDs, for downstream video and comment workflows.

parameters.description: Access token for this API service.
parameters.name: token

parameters.description: The Douyin short share URL.
parameters.name: shareUrl
